title: Cubs Lineup: Seiya Suzuki Returns as Designated Hitter Today
body:
The Chicago Cubs are looking to build on their momentum as they take on the Baltimore Orioles in Game 2 at Oriole Park at Camden Yards. After a delayed but ultimately successful Game 1, the Cubs are poised to capitalize on their strong offense and solid pitching to take the series. A key factor in their lineup will be the return of Seiya Suzuki to the designated hitter role, a move that could pay significant dividends for the team. With Colin Rea on the mound, the Cubs are confident in their ability to come out on top and secure a crucial win on the road.

The Cubs' recent performance has been a welcome sight for fans, with the team's offense clicking into high gear and the pitching staff delivering quality starts. Rea, in particular, has been impressive of late, providing a steady presence on the mound and giving his teammates the opportunity to shine. The return of Suzuki to the DH role is a significant boost, as the veteran hitter has been a catalyst for the Cubs' offense all season. His ability to drive in runs and get on base consistently will be crucial in tonight's matchup against the Orioles.

The Orioles, meanwhile, will be looking to bounce back from a disappointing loss in Game 1. Despite their best efforts, the team was unable to overcome the Cubs' potent offense, and they will need to regroup and refocus if they hope to even the series. The Orioles' pitching staff will face a tough test in trying to contain the Cubs' lineup, which has been firing on all cylinders of late. With Suzuki back in the fold, the Cubs' offense becomes even more formidable, and the Orioles will need to be at the top of their game to slow them down.

One of the key storylines to watch in tonight's game will be the matchup between Rea and the Orioles' lineup. Rea has been solid all season, but he will face a stiff test in the Orioles' potent offense. The Orioles have a number of talented hitters who are capable of doing damage, and Rea will need to be sharp if he hopes to keep them in check. On the other hand, the Cubs' offense will be looking to continue their hot streak, and Suzuki's return to the DH role could be the key to unlocking another big night.

As the series shifts into its second game, the Cubs are in a strong position to take control. With their offense firing on all cylinders and their pitching staff delivering quality starts, the team is confident in their ability to come out on top. The return of Suzuki to the DH role is a significant boost, and the Cubs will be looking to capitalize on his presence in the lineup. As the game gets underway, fans will be watching closely to see if the Cubs can build on their momentum and secure a crucial win on the road.

Looking ahead to the rest of the series, the Cubs are in a strong position to take the series and build on their recent momentum. With Suzuki back in the lineup and Rea on the mound, the team has the pieces in place to make a deep run. The Orioles, meanwhile, will be looking to regroup and refocus, but they will face a tough test in trying to slow down the Cubs' potent offense. As the series continues to unfold, fans will be watching closely to see if the Cubs can continue their hot streak and make a push for the top of the standings. With their strong lineup and solid pitching, the Cubs are a team to watch in the coming weeks, and tonight's game could be a crucial step in their journey.
